instructions.name: checkpoint_stake_rewards
docs: Permissionless crank: advance the global staking reward accumulator.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — anyone can call this crank.

instructions.name: claim_stake_rewards
docs: User: claim accumulated RISE staking rewards.

accounts.name: user_rise_sol_account
docs: riseSOL ATA — read to sync reward_debt after claim.

instructions.name: claim_unstake
docs: User redeems a matured WithdrawalTicket and receives their SOL.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone may submit this transaction — the crank bot uses its own wallet here.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The original unstaker. SOL is always sent here regardless of who calls.

instructions.name: close_stake_rewards
docs: Authority: close the stake rewards config and vault, burning any remaining RISE.
Use this before re-initializing with a new RISE mint.

accounts.name: authority_rise_account
docs: Authority's RISE token account — receives the returned tokens.

instructions.name: collect_fees
docs: Crank: collect fees and distribute to team, treasury, and veRISE index.

instructions.name: credit_staking_revenue
docs: Called by CDP program after transferring fee revenue into pool_vault.
Immediately credits the SOL to total_sol_staked and updates the exchange rate.
Permissionless — integrity guaranteed by vault balance check.

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: Initialize the global staking pool.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority (governance multisig in production, deployer in dev).

accounts.name: pool
docs: The global pool state account. Created here.

accounts.name: rise_sol_mint
docs: The riseSOL token mint. Created before this instruction.

instructions.name: initialize_stake_rewards
docs: Authority: initialize RISE staking rewards config and vault.

accounts.name: pool
docs: Global staking pool — used to verify authority and seed total_staking_supply.

accounts.name: rewards_vault
docs: Token account PDA that will hold RISE for staker rewards.
Authority is the stake_rewards_config PDA itself.

instructions.name: initialize_treasury
docs: Initialize the protocol treasury.

instructions.name: migrate_global_pool
docs: One-time migration: reallocates GlobalPool to accommodate new APY tracking fields.
Call once after deploying the updated program. Authority-only.

instructions.name: mint_for_cdp
docs: Called by CDP program via CPI to mint riseSOL to a borrower.
Authorized by cdp_config PDA signer. Does not affect staking_rise_sol_supply —
CDP supply is tracked separately in cdp_rise_sol_minted on the CDP side.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: CDP config PDA — must match global_pool.cdp_config_pubkey.
The CDP program signs this CPI with its cdp_config PDA seeds [b"cdp_config"].

accounts.name: recipient
docs: Borrower's riseSOL token account to mint into.

instructions.name: notify_rise_sol_burned
docs: Called by CDP program via CPI after burning riseSOL tokens as interest payment.
Decrements staking_rise_sol_supply so the exchange rate rises to reflect the
reduced supply — distributing the interest yield to remaining stakers.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: CDP config PDA — must match global_pool.cdp_config_pubkey.
The CDP program signs this CPI with its cdp_config PDA seeds [b"cdp_config"].

instructions.name: receive_cdp_liquidity
docs: Called after seized CDP collateral has been converted to SOL and deposited
into pool_vault. Registers the amount as liquid buffer so withdrawal tickets
can be paid out. Permissionless — verified by vault balance check.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — anyone can call this once the SOL is in pool_vault.

instructions.name: register_external_revenue
docs: External programs (e.g. CDP) call this to register revenue they have
already deposited into treasury_vault, updating the veRISE revenue index.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: CDP config PDA — must match global_pool.cdp_config_pubkey.
The CDP program signs this CPI with its cdp_config PDA seeds [b"cdp_config"].

instructions.name: register_stake_rewards
docs: User: register to receive staking RISE rewards going forward.

accounts.name: user_rise_sol_account
docs: The user's riseSOL token account — used to read their current balance.

instructions.name: set_cdp_config
docs: Authority-only: register the CDP config PDA to authorize CDP CPI calls.
Call once after both programs are deployed.

instructions.name: stake_sol
docs: User deposits SOL and receives riseSOL.

instructions.name: unstake_rise_sol
docs: User burns riseSOL and receives a WithdrawalTicket claimable after ~2 epochs.

instructions.name: update_exchange_rate
docs: Crank: reads stake account balances and updates the exchange rate.
stake_lamports_total: sum of all validator stake account balances (0 until delegation is built).

instructions.name: update_treasury_config
docs: Authority updates treasury configuration.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Only authority can update treasury config.

instructions.name: withdraw_reserve
docs: Authority: withdraw accumulated reserve SOL from treasury_vault to any destination.

instructions.name: withdraw_treasury_for_cdp_buyback
docs: Called by the CDP program via CPI to fund a collateral buyback from the treasury.
Transfers `shortfall_sol` lamports from treasury_vault to the CDP's WSOL buyback vault,
which the CDP program then wraps and swaps → collateral tokens → borrower.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: CDP config PDA — must match global_pool.cdp_config_pubkey.
The CDP program signs this CPI with seeds [b"cdp_config"].

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Insufficient liquid buffer for immediate redemption

errors.name: InvalidExchangeRate
errors.msg: Exchange rate would be invalid after this operation

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Protocol fee basis points cannot exceed 10000

errors.name: InvalidBufferBps
errors.msg: Liquid buffer target basis points cannot exceed 10000

errors.name: UnstakeNotReady
errors.msg: Withdrawal ticket is not yet claimable — epoch delay has not passed

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: AlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: GlobalPool has already been migrated to the latest size

fields.name: pending_withdrawals_lamports
docs: SOL committed to pending withdrawal tickets, not yet claimed.

fields.name: cdp_config_pubkey
docs: CDP config PDA authorized to call notify_rise_sol_burned.
Set once by authority via set_cdp_config after both programs are deployed.

fields.name: prev_exchange_rate
docs: Exchange rate recorded at the previous `update_exchange_rate` call.
Used by the frontend to compute APY: annualize (current - prev) / prev over the slot delta.

fields.name: prev_rate_update_slot
docs: Slot at which `prev_exchange_rate` was captured.

fields.name: unstake_nonce
docs: Auto-incrementing counter used to seed withdrawal ticket PDAs.
Removes the need for the caller to supply a nonce.

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority.

fields.name: team_wallet
docs: Team salary wallet — receives team_fee_bps of all revenue.

fields.name: team_fee_bps
docs: Team salary split in basis points. Default: 500 (5%).
Adjustable by authority only.

fields.name: verise_share_bps
docs: Of the remaining 95%, what percentage goes to veRISE holders.
Default: 5000 (50%). Adjustable by governance.

fields.name: reserve_lamports
docs: Total SOL accumulated in treasury reserve (retained portion).

fields.name: revenue_index
docs: Global revenue index for veRISE reward tracking.
Increases each epoch by (epoch_revenue_for_verise / total_verise_supply).

fields.name: total_distributed
docs: Total SOL distributed to veRISE holders all time.

fields.name: last_collection_epoch
docs: Last epoch fees were collected.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

types.name: StakeRewardsConfig
docs: Global staking-rewards configuration.
Mirrors BorrowRewardsConfig in the CDP program — same slot-based accumulator pattern.

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority.

fields.name: rise_mint
docs: RISE token mint.

fields.name: rewards_vault
docs: PDA token account that holds RISE for staker distribution (stored for CPI reference).

fields.name: reward_per_token
docs: Global accumulator: RISE earned per unit of riseSOL held (scaled by REWARD_SCALE).

fields.name: epoch_emissions
docs: RISE tokens emitted per epoch across all stakers combined.

fields.name: slots_per_epoch
docs: Epoch length in slots (~1 week).

fields.name: total_staking_supply
docs: Total riseSOL held by *staking-origin* depositors — updated on every stake/unstake.
IMPORTANT: This tracks only riseSOL minted via stake_sol. It does NOT include
CDP-minted riseSOL (tracked separately in CdpConfig.cdp_rise_sol_minted) and
must never be used as a proxy for total riseSOL supply.

fields.name: last_checkpoint_slot
docs: Slot when the accumulator was last advanced.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: UserStakeRewards
docs: Per-user staking rewards tracker. One account per wallet.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that owns this tracker.

fields.name: rise_sol_amount
docs: riseSOL balance at last sync (stake / unstake / claim).

fields.name: reward_debt
docs: reward_per_token * rise_sol_amount / SCALE at last sync — used to prevent
collecting rewards for tokens held before the account was opened.

fields.name: pending_rewards
docs: Accumulated unclaimed RISE rewards (settled on each balance change).

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Lifetime RISE claimed.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: WithdrawalTicket
docs: A queued unstake request. Created by `unstake_rise_sol`, claimed by `claim_unstake`
after UNSTAKE_EPOCH_DELAY epochs have passed.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that requested the unstake.

fields.name: sol_amount
docs: SOL to return, locked in at the exchange rate when the ticket was created.

fields.name: claimable_epoch
docs: Earliest epoch the owner can call `claim_unstake`.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Global nonce from GlobalPool.unstake_nonce — used to derive this ticket's PDA.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.
